  "text": "The Envoy Admin API is implemented across several C++ source files under source/server/admin/ in the sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2 repository.\n\n## Core Admin Implementation\n\n**source/server/admin/admin.cc** and **source/server/admin/admin.h** are the central files:\n- `AdminImpl` class implements the `Admin` interface (envoy/server/admin.h)\n- `AdminImpl::addHandler()` (line 485 in admin.cc) registers non-streaming admin handlers by wrapping them in a `RequestGasket` and delegating to `addStreamingHandler()`\n- `AdminImpl::addStreamingHandler()` (line 460) is the core registration method that stores handlers in the `handlers_` list\n- All endpoint registrations happen in the `AdminImpl` constructor (lines 126-259) using `makeHandler()` calls\n- `AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain()` (line 289) sets up the HTTP connection manager for admin connections\n- `AdminImpl::createFilterChain()` (line 300) adds `AdminFilter` to the HTTP filter chain\n- `AdminFilterChain` class (admin.h line 421) implements `Network::FilterChain` for the admin listener\n- `AdminListener` class (admin.h line 366) implements `Network::ListenerConfig` for the admin listener\n\n## Admin Filter Chain\n\n**source/server/admin/admin_filter.cc** and **source/server/admin/admin_filter.h** implement the HTTP filter (`AdminFilter`) that processes incoming admin requests and dispatches them to the appropriate handler.\n\n## Endpoint Implementations\n\n### /clusters\n- **source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc** and **clusters_handler.h**: `ClustersHandler::handlerClusters()` returns upstream cluster status\n\n### /listeners\n- **source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc** and **listeners_handler.h**: `ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo()` returns listener info; `ListenersHandler::handlerDrainListeners()` handles drain\n\n### /config_dump\n- **source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc** and **config_dump_handler.h**: `ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump()` dumps current Envoy xDS configs\n\n### /stats\n- **source/server/admin/stats_handler.cc** and **stats_handler.h**: `StatsHandler::handlerStats()`, `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats()`, `StatsHandler::handlerContention()`, and related methods\n- **source/server/admin/stats_request.cc/.h**: Streaming stats request implementation\n- **source/server/admin/stats_params.cc/.h**: Stats query parameter parsing\n- **source/server/admin/stats_render.cc/.h**: Stats rendering base classes\n- **source/server/admin/stats_html_render.cc/.h**: HTML rendering for stats\n- **source/server/admin/prometheus_stats.cc/.h**: Prometheus format rendering for /stats/prometheus\n\n## Supporting Files\n- **source/server/admin/admin_html.cc**, **admin_html_util.cc/.h**: HTML generation for the admin homepage\n- **source/server/admin/admin_no_html.cc**: Stub when HTML is disabled\n- **source/server/admin/config_tracker_impl.cc/.h**: Config tracker implementation used by config_dump\n- **source/server/admin/utils.cc/.h**: Utility functions shared across handlers\n- **source/server/admin/handler_ctx.h**: Handler context interface\n- **source/server/admin/admin_factory_context.h**: Factory context for admin\n- **source/server/admin/logs_handler.cc/.h**: /logging endpoint\n- **source/server/admin/profiling_handler.cc/.h**: /cpuprofiler and /heapprofiler endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/runtime_handler.cc/.h**: /runtime and /runtime_modify endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/server_cmd_handler.cc/.h**: /quitquitquit, /healthcheck/* endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/server_info_handler.cc/.h**: /server_info, /certs, /ready, /memory endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/init_dump_handler.cc/.h**: /init_dump endpoint\n\n## Interface Definition\n- **envoy/server/admin.h**: The abstract `Admin` interface defining `addHandler()`, `addStreamingHandler()`, `removeHandler()`, etc.\n\n## Config Validation Stub\n- **source/server/config_validation/admin.cc** and **admin.h**: A stub `ValidationAdmin` implementation used during config validation mode (all handler registrations are no-ops)."
}

333: class RequestGasket : public Admin::Request {

336:       : handler_cb_(handler_cb), admin_stream_(admin_stream) {}

  "text": "The Envoy Admin API is implemented across several C++ source files under source/server/admin/ in the sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2 repository.\n\n## Core Admin Implementation\n\n**source/server/admin/admin.cc** and **source/server/admin/admin.h** are the central files:\n- `AdminImpl` class implements the `Admin` interface (envoy/server/admin.h)\n- `AdminImpl::addHandler()` (line 485 in admin.cc) registers non-streaming admin handlers by wrapping them in a `RequestGasket` and delegating to `addStreamingHandler()`\n- `AdminImpl::addStreamingHandler()` (line 460) is the core registration method that stores handlers in the `handlers_` list\n- All endpoint registrations happen in the `AdminImpl` constructor (lines 126-259) using `makeHandler()` calls\n- `AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain()` (line 289) sets up the HTTP connection manager for admin connections\n- `AdminImpl::createFilterChain()` (line 300) adds `AdminFilter` to the HTTP filter chain\n- `AdminFilterChain` class (admin.h line 421) implements `Network::FilterChain` for the admin listener\n- `AdminListener` class (admin.h line 366) implements `Network::ListenerConfig` for the admin listener\n\n## Admin Filter Chain\n\n**source/server/admin/admin_filter.cc** and **source/server/admin/admin_filter.h** implement the HTTP filter (`AdminFilter`) that processes incoming admin requests and dispatches them to the appropriate handler.\n\n## Endpoint Implementations\n\n### /clusters\n- **source/server/admin/clusters_handler.cc** and **clusters_handler.h**: `ClustersHandler::handlerClusters()` returns upstream cluster status\n\n### /listeners\n- **source/server/admin/listeners_handler.cc** and **listeners_handler.h**: `ListenersHandler::handlerListenerInfo()` returns listener info; `ListenersHandler::handlerDrainListeners()` handles drain\n\n### /config_dump\n- **source/server/admin/config_dump_handler.cc** and **config_dump_handler.h**: `ConfigDumpHandler::handlerConfigDump()` dumps current Envoy xDS configs\n\n### /stats\n- **source/server/admin/stats_handler.cc** and **stats_handler.h**: `StatsHandler::handlerStats()`, `StatsHandler::handlerPrometheusStats()`, `StatsHandler::handlerContention()`, and related methods\n- **source/server/admin/stats_request.cc/.h**: Streaming stats request implementation\n- **source/server/admin/stats_params.cc/.h**: Stats query parameter parsing\n- **source/server/admin/stats_render.cc/.h**: Stats rendering base classes\n- **source/server/admin/stats_html_render.cc/.h**: HTML rendering for stats\n- **source/server/admin/prometheus_stats.cc/.h**: Prometheus format rendering for /stats/prometheus\n\n## Supporting Files\n- **source/server/admin/admin_html.cc**, **admin_html_util.cc/.h**: HTML generation for the admin homepage\n- **source/server/admin/admin_no_html.cc**: Stub when HTML is disabled\n- **source/server/admin/config_tracker_impl.cc/.h**: Config tracker implementation used by config_dump\n- **source/server/admin/utils.cc/.h**: Utility functions shared across handlers\n- **source/server/admin/handler_ctx.h**: Handler context interface\n- **source/server/admin/admin_factory_context.h**: Factory context for admin\n- **source/server/admin/logs_handler.cc/.h**: /logging endpoint\n- **source/server/admin/profiling_handler.cc/.h**: /cpuprofiler and /heapprofiler endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/runtime_handler.cc/.h**: /runtime and /runtime_modify endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/server_cmd_handler.cc/.h**: /quitquitquit, /healthcheck/* endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/server_info_handler.cc/.h**: /server_info, /certs, /ready, /memory endpoints\n- **source/server/admin/init_dump_handler.cc/.h**: /init_dump endpoint\n\n## Interface Definition\n- **envoy/server/admin.h**: The abstract `Admin` interface defining `addHandler()`, `addStreamingHandler()`, `removeHandler()`, etc.\n\n## Config Validation Stub\n- **source/server/config_validation/admin.cc** and **admin.h**: A stub `ValidationAdmin` implementation used during config validation mode (all handler registrations are no-ops)."
